name_en: 🆕【 N40638 Pink 】For the Damierlicious special edition, the Victorine wallet is crafted in Damier canvas with a sweet and soft color palette. It brings a fresh and gentle touch to this compact wallet, featuring an envelope-style flap with a gold-engraved clasp. Inside, there are pockets for bills and coins, as well as six card slots. size:12x9.5x1.5cm C
